unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl rollout undo.

Safety policy observed: Rollback remains a Class 3 action requiring domain supervisor, generalist supervisor, and human confirmation.
Safety policy observed: Do not roll back unless current symptoms, recent deploy correlation, and service-local failure evidence all align.
Safety policy observed: Do not shift traffic without declared blast radius, dry-run evidence, and operator approval.
